'''Tinn VI''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Tinn system]]. It had six [[Moon/Legends|moons]], including [[Tinn VI-B]] and the inhabited [[Echnos]]. Located at the limit of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], it was a common stopover point for [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] en route to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
